cost_name: Procurement & Supply Chain Management — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: AACE factored estimate: procurement ~3% of direct costs. Includes sourcing, tendering, expediting, inspection, logistics coordination, and supplier quality management.

confidence.rationale: Standard industrial procurement cost factor. Hydrogen projects may have higher logistics cost (oversized electrolyzer modules, specialized transport).

primary_drivers: Number of purchase orders and suppliers

sources.title: AACE 18R-97 — Procurement cost factor for process plants
sources.author: AACE
